[CLUB & SOCIETY REGISTRATION WEEK]

Greetings everyone,
We are delighted to announce that we are now open for registration, welcoming new members in our club. Both girls and boys are welcomed as well as newly beginner, or experienced player and even to those who wanna try out how rugby is.

Ready to tackle new challenges and kick off an exciting journey with the rugby team by scanning the QR code! 🏉 

For any further inquiries, please do not hesitate to contact:
